examples.name: tab_name
display_username
examples.py:
def display_username(handle: str) -> str:
    return handle.split("@")[0] if "@" in handle else handle

examples.name: signature_phrase
examples.py:
def signature_phrase(signatures: int) -> str:
    return f"{signatures} signature{'s' if signatures != 1 else ''}"

examples.name: output_tail
examples.jac:
def output_tail(out: str) -> str {
    return "
".join(out.strip().splitlines()[-8:]);
}

with entry { print(output_tail('l1
l2
l3
l4
l5
l6
l7
l8
l9
l10
')); }

l4

examples.name: normalize_tags
search_filter
lang_label
truncate_note
capture_summary
examples.py:
def capture_summary(results: list) -> str:
    oks = len([r for r in results if r["status"] == "ok"])
    skips = len([r for r in results if r["status"] == "skip"])
    fails = len(results) - oks - skips
    code = 0 if oks > 0 else 1
    return f"{oks} ok / {skips} skip / {fails} fail -> exit {code}"

examples.name: should_skip
shade_rgb
parse_bench_json
lcg_stream
examples.py:
def lcg_stream(spec: dict) -> list:
    seed = spec["seed"]
    vals = []
    for i in range(spec["n"]):
        seed = (seed * 1103515245 + 12345) % 2147483648
        vals.append(float(seed) / 2147483648.0)
    return vals
